headers.Feature-Policy: accelerometer 'none'; ambient-light-sensor 'none'; autoplay 'none'; camera 'none'; encrypted-media 'none'; fullscreen 'self'; geolocation 'none'; gyroscope 'none'; magnetometer 'none'; microphone 'none'; midi 'none'; payment 'none';  picture-in-picture 'none'; speaker 'none'; sync-xhr 'none'; usb 'none'; vr 'none';
headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; child-src 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-src 'self'; img-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
